title: in situ hybridization performed on the peri-rhopalial tissue of a scyphozoan jellyfish
steps: Fix tissue 2 h, RT, in freshly prepared 4% PF in 0.1 M PB (pH 9.5) + 0.42M NaCl + 2 mM MgSO4
Wash 3X 5’ in PBST, pH 7.5
Dehydration in PBS/methanol 3:1 → 1:1 → 1:3 10 min each then 100% methanol 5 min to ON in -20C.
Rehydration in PBS/methanol 1:3 → 1:1 → 3:1 10 min each then PBST, 10 min.

Heat treatment in 1 ml PBST, 5 min. Bain-marie at 95C with stopper. First 2 min, tissue should be resuspended vigorously every 20 sec, every 60 sec during the rest of incubation in order to prevent glueing of specimens. Snap-cool tubes on ice.
Wash 2X in PBST
Incubation 5 min in TEAA
Wash 2X 10 min in PBST
Post-fixation in 4% PF in PBST pH 7.5 for 20 min.
Wash 3X in PBST, 10 min each
Saturation of unspecific binding with 75 ul PBST/HS-DNA (0,5 mg/ml) for 10 min
Addition of the same amount of HybMix, incubate 5 min
Prehybridization in 150 ul HybMix for 10 min RT
Prehybridization in 150 ul HybMix for 2h at 45C
Hybridization in 1 ml HybMix + DIG-probes sense or antisense for 1 day and 2 nights at 40C. Before use, denature probe in HybMix at 70C for 10 min and snap-cool on ice.
2 wash in 1 ml of Wash I 60 min at 45C
4 wash in 1 ml of Wash I, 15 min at 45C
Wash in PBST 20 min.
Saturation in PBST/10% NGS, 2h in fridge with shaking
Incubation in anti-DIG-AP-conjugated antibody diluted 1:2000 in PBST containing 1 % NGS/ 4C over the weekend with shaking. (preadsorption was not necessary).
Wash 4X in PBST for 20 min.
Incubation 3X 10min in AP-Buffer (containing 10mM MgCl2)
Substrate reaction with NBT/BCIP solution
Stop reaction with PBST/50 mM EDTA. 3X 5min
Phosphate Buffer pH 9-9.5: made from phosphate dibasic (No pH adjustment required )
PBS: 100 mM pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl
PBST: PBS +0.1% Tween

TEA: 0.1 M triethanolamine. Dissolve powder in water. Adjust pH at 7.8 with 5 N NaOH. TEAA: 5 ml TEA + 12, 5 ul glacial acetic acid. Acetic acid must be added to TEA just before the incubation with tissues.
PBST/fish sperm: 0, 5 mg/ml fish sperm DNA in PBST. This DNA was made from herring and cod sperm and has a molecular weight distribution of 150-3000 bases.
HybMix: 50% formamide 5 x SSC 1mg/ml HS-DNA 0, 1% Tween 20
Wash I: 50% formamide 2 x SSC 0, 1 % Tween 20
Blocking solution: 10 % normal goat serum in PBST
creator: Christelle Bouchard
